---
title: "Pypomp vs R Parameter Comparison"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "View Code"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
import logging
import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import pyreadr
from scipy.special import logit
from plotnine import *

# Hide the noisy JAX CUDA initialization error on machines without a GPU
logging.getLogger("jax._src.xla_bridge").setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)

# Load Python results
with open("results/mif_coefs.pkl", "rb") as f:
    py_results = pickle.load(f)

py_results["source"] = "pypomp"
py_results = py_results.drop(
    columns=["logLik", "se", "theta_idx"], errors="ignore"
).melt(id_vars=["source", "unit"], var_name="param", value_name="value")

# Load R results directly using pyreadr
r_data = pyreadr.read_r("results/mif_coefs.rds")
r_results = r_data[None]
r_results["source"] = "R"
r_results = r_results[["source", "unit", "coef", "names"]].rename(
    columns={"coef": "value", "names": "param"}
)
```


# Compare results

<!-- ## Summary statistics -->
```{python}
#| label: summary-stats
#| include: False

# Combine for the plotting transformations
combined = pd.concat([py_results, r_results], ignore_index=True)

log_params = ["gamma", "sigma", "iota", "R0", "sigmaSE"]
logit_params = ["S_0", "E_0", "I_0", "R_0"]

# Apply mathematical transformations matching R's log and qlogis
combined["value"] = np.where(
    combined["param"].isin(log_params),
    np.log(combined["value"]),
    np.where(
        combined["param"].isin(logit_params),
        logit(combined["value"]),
        combined["value"],
    ),
)

# Update parameter labels to reflect transformations
param_mapping = {p: f"log({p})" for p in log_params}
param_mapping.update({p: f"logit({p})" for p in logit_params})
combined["param"] = combined["param"].replace(param_mapping)


# Generate summaries (matching the original R logic mapping from untransformed frames)
summary_py = (
    py_results.groupby("param")["value"]
    .agg(n="count", mean="mean", sd="std", min="min", max="max")
    .reset_index()
)
summary_py["source"] = "pypomp"

summary_r = (
    r_results.groupby("param")["value"]
    .agg(n="count", mean="mean", sd="std", min="min", max="max")
    .reset_index()
)
summary_r["source"] = "R"

print("--- Pypomp Summary ---")
print(summary_py.to_string(index=False))
print("\n--- R Summary ---")
print(summary_r.to_string(index=False))
```

## Density plot
```{python}
#| label: comparison-plots
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
#| warning: false

# Loop through unique units and print a density grid for each
for unit_val in combined["unit"].unique():
    unit_data = combined[combined["unit"] == unit_val]

    gg = (
        ggplot(unit_data, aes(x="value", fill="source"))
        + geom_density(alpha=0.6)
        + facet_wrap("~param", scales="free")
        + labs(title=f"Unit: {unit_val}", x="Parameter Value", fill="Source")
        + theme_minimal()
    )
    gg.show()
```
